compressed_prompt: Create 4-section clown resume, no section titles.
response:
# 🤡

**Bobo "Thunderpants" McGillicuddy**
📍 Under the Big Top, Anywhere USA | 📞 (555) HON-KHON | ✉️ bobo@rednosepro.com

---

Seasoned professional clown with 14 years of experience bringing chaos, laughter, and mild panic to audiences of all ages. Internationally trained in the ancient arts of pratfalling, horn-honking, and emerging from undersized vehicles. Equally comfortable performing for birthday parties, corporate events, and courtroom appearances. Deeply committed to the craft. Cannot remove the nose. Have tried.

---

**Clown-in-Residence** | Gigglesworth Circus | 2018–Present
Headlined 300+ performances annually before live audiences of up to 4,000 people. Supervised a team of 6 junior clowns. Reduced pie-related workplace injuries by 40%.

**Freelance Birthday Clown** | Self-Employed | 2010–2018
Delivered tailored comedic experiences for private clients. Maintained a 4.2-star rating despite the incident. Specialized in balloon animals, including the controversial "existential dachshund."

---

Juggling (7 objects, 4 flaming) | Advanced Seltzer Deployment | Unicycle Operation | Mime (reluctantly) | Balloon Sculpture | Tiny Car Navigation | Emotional Resilience | Falling Down Stairs (intentionally)

---

*"He made my son laugh so hard he cried. Then I cried. Then Bobo cried. We don't know why Bobo cried."*
— Karen T., Verified Client

*"Arrived on time. Left eventually."*
— Corporate Event Coordinator, Deloitte
